verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Come to me my people, come There's no need to be afraid of your Father When I see you I will run I will be there, I will be there

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Before you call, I will answer you While you still speak, I will hear My ears are turned to the cry of my chosen ones In my love you can rest in me For you are my very own So hold on to the hope you have That I would draw you to myself For I will never leave you alone

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I will not forget you, I gather my lambs in my arms So I will comfort you and carry you close to my heart!
